title: Akan Creation: Nyame and the Golden Stool
description: The Akan creation narrative: Nyame the sky god creates the world, and the Golden Stool descends from heaven to establish the Ashanti kingdom.
introduction: The Akan creation narrative: Nyame the sky god creates the world, and the Golden Stool descends from heaven to establish the Ashanti kingdom.

translation.original_text: Nyame, the sky god, created all things. He took the world and placed it in his hand.
